team_description: A team centered on early achievement and youthful breakthroughs. Useful for intensive learning, short-cycle execution, and growth planning.

members.name: Huo Qubing
members.description: A young military prodigy known for rapid decision-making and execution.

members.name: Wang Bi
members.description: A young philosopher with exceptional abstract reasoning and reinterpretation ability.

members.name: Ada Lovelace
members.description: A pioneering computational thinker representing cross-disciplinary creativity.

members.name: Alexander Hamilton
members.description: Contributed to state-building at a young age with strong rhetoric and organization.

members.name: John Stuart Mill
members.description: A classic early-formed thinker emphasizing disciplined reasoning and self-correction.

members.name: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
members.description: Rose to literary prominence early and embodies sustained artistic development.

members.name: Career Planner
members.description: Helps high-potential individuals define path, pace, and key inflection points.

members.name: Skills Coach
members.description: Focuses on deliberate practice of core skills for faster short-term improvement.
